mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 1.0% signals monetary accommodation that reduces equity discount rates and increases present value of future corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls below 1.0% and remains there for 2+ consecutive months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns following trigger activation are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Monthly payroll employment growth above 150,000 persons signals robust labor market momentum that sustains consumer spending and corporate profit growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Correlation between month-over-month PAYEMS growth and 5-day forward SPX returns is not significantly positive (Pearson r < 0.15, p > 0.05) over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in retail sales (RSAFS) combined with rising unemployment (UNRATE > 4.5%) signals demand destruction and recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days as equity valuations compress.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines > 2% month-over-month AND UNRATE rises above 4.5%
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns following joint trigger activation are positive in > 55% of instances, or Rank IC of the interaction term is below 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth above 102.0 (index 2017=100) indicates robust manufacturing and supply-side capacity utilization, supporting corporate earnings and positive equity returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises above 102.0 and sustains for 2+ consecutive months
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods when INDPRO > 102.0 are not significantly higher than when INDPRO ≤ 102.0 (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) above 1,700 thousand units combined with rising real GDP growth signals strong demand-side momentum and construction sector health, producing positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days through multiplier effects.
candidate_trigger: HOUST > 1,700 thousand AND GDPC1 growth > 2.0% annualized over prior quarter
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns following joint trigger activation are negative in > 50% of instances, or the interaction coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in any 2-year rolling regression.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation measured by CPIAUCSL rising above 285.0 (index 1982-1984=100) signals price pressures that force the Federal Reserve to maintain or raise rates, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises above 285.0 and remains elevated for 2+ consecutive months
regime_hint: inflationary regime with monetary tightening pressure
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in high-inflation periods (CPIAUCSL > 285.0) are not significantly lower than low-inflation periods (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate (UNRATE) declining below 3.8% signals tight labor market conditions that increase wage pressures and consumer confidence, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days through improved earnings expectations.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls below 3.8% and remains below for 2+ consecutive months
regime_hint: tight labor market with wage acceleration
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in tight labor market periods (UNRATE < 3.8%) are not significantly higher than slack periods (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production decline combined with rising unemployment signals supply-side weakness and demand destruction, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days as recession risk increases and profit margins compress.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines > 1.0% month-over-month AND UNRATE rises > 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns following joint trigger activation are positive in > 55% of instances, or the interaction term Rank IC is below 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.
